untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of specific chart patterns (head-and-shoulders bottom, down-sloping neckline, ascending scallop formation) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed point-in-time indicators. These are multi-bar pattern recognition requirements that require custom pattern detection logic not available in the indicator set. Additionally, conditions like 'bottoms 6 weeks apart', 'rise between bottoms over 10%', and 'volume higher on left bottom than right bottom' require historical peak/trough identification and comparison across multiple weeks, which exceeds the scope of allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation uses: close > pivot (neckline breakout proxy), volume > hvol_20 (volume confirmation), and close < sma_20 (exit on trend reversal). However, this is a poor substitute for the actual pattern-based signal. A proper implementation would require custom pattern detection functions for head-and-shoulders formations and scallop patterns.
